title: Bridge Essay: Does the Wim Hof Method have a beneficial impact on physiological and psychologi

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Heat/Fire** (Phase 3) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Heat/Fire to mechanistic neuroscience through Does, the, Wim, Hof, Method.

**Does the Wim Hof Method have abeneficial impact on physiological and psychological outcomes in healthy and non-healthy participants? Asystematic review.** — PLoS One. PMID: 38478473. DOI: 10.1371/journal.pone.0286933. Wim Hof, also known as the iceman, developed amethod called Wim Hof Method (WHM) which he claims to have several benefits on physical and mental health. The aim of this systematic review is to identify and synthesise the results of the studies conducted on WHM on physiological and psychological health-related outcomes. This systematic review followed the PRISMA guidelines for systematic reviews. The protocol was registered in the International Prospective Register of Systematic Reviews (PROSPER
